inputs.label: standard
inputs.story: Analysis of teacher salaries across 12 school districts shows a 40% gap between the highest and lowest-paying districts, with the lowest-paying districts also having the highest teacher turnover rates. The three lowest-paying districts lost an average of 18% of their teaching staff last year.
inputs.format: Digital article full-width and Instagram square social card
inputs.house_style: White background, dark blue primary, orange accent, sans-serif

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.story: Local hospital emergency department wait times have doubled from an average of 2.5 hours in 2020 to 5.1 hours in 2025.

inputs.label: european
inputs.story: EU renewable energy data shows that Denmark generates 84% of its electricity from renewables, while Poland generates only 23%. Across all 27 member states, the average rose from 34% in 2020 to 47% in 2025. The five newest EU member states all fall below the average.
inputs.format: Digital article full-width for desktop and mobile, plus a 1:1 social card for LinkedIn and Twitter/X
inputs.house_style: Dark background (#1a1a2e), green accent (#2ecc71), white text, sans-serif
